items.title: I built an AI Agent that lives directly in your CLI and Desktop
items.description:
Let's be real: the current AI coding workflow is tedious.

You hit a bug. You copy your code. You tab out to ChatGPT/Claude. You paste it. You copy the fix. You paste it back. Oh wait, it broke something else? Repeat the cycle.

items.title: Tired of typing `cd`? I built a Proton-T is a smarter cd command, blazing-fast directory jumper in Rust
items.description:

items.description:
